_comment: Copy this file to config.local.json (same folder) and fill in real values. config.local.json is gitignored. Both the Windows PC and the MacBook need their own copy — Windows-only fields can be blank on the Mac and vice versa. See docs/CREDENTIALS.md for a step-by-step credential-gathering guide.

unity._comment: clearCacheBeforeBuild=true removes Library/BurstCache, Library/Bee, Library/ScriptAssemblies, and Temp before every Unity run. Triggers a full reimport (+5-15 min first rebuild). Use when stale Burst/codegen output causes 'RpcSystem failed to deserialize RPC ... bits read X did not match expected Y' and similar wire-format desync. Also overridable per-run with -ClearCache (Windows) or --clear-cache / CLEAR_CACHE=true (Mac).

build._comment: Output binary names used in Unity's -cliBuildPath and referenced by Steam VDFs.

android._comment: keystorePath is relative to the project root if not absolute. keyaliasPassword blank = reuse keystorePassword.

steam._comment: Leave username empty to skip Steam uploads entirely. appId/depotIds come from Steamworks partner dashboard.

mac._comment: runMode=ssh drives the Mac over SSH from Windows; runMode=manual prints the command for you to run yourself. keychainPassword is ONLY read by the Mac-side build_mac.sh — the Windows PC never sees it. It's your macOS login password, needed so codesign can access the signing identity's private key in a headless SSH session (otherwise xcodebuild fails with errSecInternalComponent). Leave empty if you only ever run build_mac.sh from a GUI terminal. macAddress enables Wake-on-LAN: if the Mac is asleep when the Windows orchestrator starts, a magic packet is sent and SSH is polled until ready. Requires on the Mac: System Settings > Energy Saver (or Battery > Options) > 'Wake for network access' ON, plugged into power, Ethernet strongly preferred. Find the MAC with `ifconfig en0 | grep ether` (Ethernet) or `ifconfig en1 | grep ether` (Wi-Fi); use the active interface. Leave macAddress empty to disable WoL entirely (you'll get a warn-and-continue if the Mac is asleep). wolBroadcastAddress defaults to 255.255.255.255; switch to a directed broadcast like 192.168.1.255 if your router doesn't forward limited broadcasts across subnets. wolPort is 9 by default (7 also common).

playStore._comment: Leave serviceAccountJsonPath empty to skip Play Store upload. Store the JSON outside the repo. track: internal | alpha | beta | production.

testFlight._comment: Leave ascApiKeyId empty to skip TestFlight upload. teamId is your 10-char Apple Developer Team ID. ascApiKeyP8Path must exist on the MAC (Apple only downloads the .p8 once; recommended location is ~/.appstoreconnect/private_keys/).
